homepage.heroSubline: Reliable repairs and installations across Albuquerque. Decades of experience handling New Mexico's unique climate challenges.
homepage.aboutTitle: Your Trusted Albuquerque Garage Door Partner
aboutText: Sandia Garage Door Repair started with a simple mission: to provide honest, reliable garage door services to our neighbors in Albuquerque. We're a locally owned and operated company, born and raised right here in Bernalillo County.

We believe in doing things the right way, every time. That means using quality parts, employing skilled technicians, and treating every customer with respect. We prioritize clear communication and transparent pricing.
Our commitment extends beyond just garage doors. We actively support local schools and charities, because Albuquerque is more than just where we work—it's our home.

valueProps.title: Rapid Response
valueProps.description: Fast, reliable service when you need it most. We understand garage door problems don't always happen during business hours.

valueProps.title: Expert Technicians
valueProps.description: Our team is highly trained and experienced in all aspects of garage door repair and installation. We know our way around New Mexico's specific challenges.

valueProps.title: Quality Parts
valueProps.description: We use only durable, dependable parts from leading manufacturers. This ensures long-lasting performance and reliability.

valueProps.title: Upfront Pricing
valueProps.description: No hidden fees or surprises. We provide clear, honest estimates before any work begins.

homepage.ctaHeadline: Get Your Free Garage Door Estimate Today!
homepage.ctaSubline: Contact us now for a quick, no-obligation quote on your garage door repair or installation project.

services.name: Garage Door Repair
services.shortDescription: Fast, reliable garage door repair services throughout Albuquerque.
services.description:
Is your garage door making strange noises, refusing to open, or hanging crookedly? Sandia Garage Door Repair offers comprehensive repair services to get your door back in top shape. We handle everything from broken springs and cables to malfunctioning openers and damaged panels. Albuquerque's intense sun and monsoon seasons can take a toll on garage doors, leading to warping, rust, and decreased performance. We have the experience to diagnose and fix any issue, big or small. 

Our technicians arrive promptly, equipped with the tools and parts needed to complete most repairs on the spot. We prioritize safety and efficiency, ensuring your garage door is functioning smoothly and securely. We work on all makes and models of garage doors, and we stand behind our work with a satisfaction guarantee. Don't let a faulty garage door disrupt your day – call Sandia Garage Door Repair for fast, dependable service.
process: Step 1: Schedule a convenient appointment time.
Step 2: Our technician will diagnose the problem and provide a detailed estimate.
Step 3: With your approval, we'll complete the repair using quality parts.
Step 4: We'll test the door to ensure proper operation and safety.

faq.question: How quickly can you respond to a repair request?
faq.answer: We offer same-day service in many cases. Call us, and we'll do our best to get a technician to your home as soon as possible.

faq.question: What types of garage doors do you repair?
faq.answer: We repair all makes and models of residential and commercial garage doors, including sectional, roll-up, and tilt-up doors.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer 24/7 emergency repair services for situations that require immediate attention.

services.name: Garage Door Installation
services.shortDescription: Professional garage door installation services for Albuquerque homes and businesses.
services.description:
Looking to upgrade your garage door or install a new one? Sandia Garage Door Repair provides expert installation services tailored to your specific needs and budget. We offer a wide selection of garage doors from leading manufacturers, including steel, wood, aluminum, and insulated options. We understand that Albuquerque homes often feature stucco or adobe exteriors, and we can help you choose a door that complements your home's style. 

Our experienced technicians handle every aspect of the installation process, from removing your old door to ensuring the new one operates smoothly and safely. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring proper alignment, weather sealing, and opener functionality. We also provide guidance on garage door maintenance to keep your new door looking and working its best for years to come. With Sandia Garage Door Repair, you can be confident that your new garage door installation will be done right.
process: Step 1: Schedule a free consultation to discuss your needs and preferences.
Step 2: We'll provide a detailed estimate with a range of door options.
Step 3: Once you select a door, we'll schedule the installation.
Step 4: Our technicians will install the door and ensure proper operation.

faq.question: How long does a garage door installation take?
faq.answer: Most installations can be completed in a single day, depending on the complexity of the job.

faq.question: Do you offer garage door opener installation?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer installation of garage door openers, including chain-drive, belt-drive, and smart openers.

faq.question: What is the best type of garage door for Albuquerque's climate?
faq.answer: Insulated steel doors are a popular choice in Albuquerque due to their durability and energy efficiency. They can withstand the intense sun and help regulate the temperature inside your garage.

services.name: Garage Door Opener Repair
services.shortDescription: Albuquerque's trusted source for garage door opener repair and replacement.
services.description:
A malfunctioning garage door opener can be a major inconvenience. Sandia Garage Door Repair specializes in diagnosing and repairing all types of garage door openers. Whether your opener is making strange noises, failing to open or close the door, or experiencing remote control issues, our expert technicians can quickly identify the problem and provide an effective solution. We work on all major brands of openers, including Chamberlain, LiftMaster, Genie and more. 

We understand that Albuquerque's frequent power surges can damage garage door openers. We can also assist with installing surge protectors to prevent future damage. From replacing worn gears to reprogramming remotes, we have the skills and experience to get your garage door opener working like new. We also offer garage door opener replacement services if your existing unit is beyond repair or you're looking to upgrade to a newer model with advanced features.
process: Step 1: Inspect the opener and diagnose the issue.
Step 2: Provide a clear explanation of the problem and repair options.
Step 3: Complete the repair using quality replacement parts.
Step 4: Test the opener to ensure proper operation and safety features.

faq.question: How do I know if my garage door opener needs to be repaired or replaced?
faq.answer: If your opener is more than 10 years old, experiencing frequent problems, or exhibiting signs of wear and tear, it may be time to consider a replacement.

faq.question: Can you program my garage door remote?
faq.answer: Yes, we can program or reprogram your garage door remote, even if you've lost the original instructions.

faq.question: Do you offer smart garage door openers?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a range of smart garage door openers that can be controlled from your smartphone or other devices.

services.name: Garage Door Spring Replacement
services.shortDescription: Safe and reliable garage door spring replacement in Albuquerque, NM.
services.description:
Garage door springs are under immense tension and can be dangerous to handle without the proper tools and expertise. Sandia Garage Door Repair offers professional garage door spring replacement services to ensure your safety and the proper functioning of your garage door. We use only high-quality springs that are designed to withstand the rigors of Albuquerque's climate. 

Whether you have torsion springs or extension springs, our experienced technicians can quickly and safely replace them. We'll also inspect your garage door system to identify any other potential issues and ensure that everything is working correctly. Never attempt to replace garage door springs yourself – call Sandia Garage Door Repair for safe and reliable service.
process: Step 1: Assess the type and size of springs needed.
Step 2: Safely remove the old springs.
Step 3: Install the new springs with proper tension.
Step 4: Test the door balance and operation.

faq.question: How do I know if my garage door springs are broken?
faq.answer: Common signs of broken garage door springs include a loud snapping sound, a garage door that is difficult to lift, or a garage door that hangs crookedly.

faq.question: How long do garage door springs last?
faq.answer: The lifespan of garage door springs depends on usage and maintenance, but typically ranges from 5 to 10 years.

faq.question: Why is it important to replace both garage door springs at the same time?
faq.answer: Replacing both springs at the same time ensures even balance and prevents one spring from failing prematurely.

services.name: Garage Door Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Keep your garage door running smoothly with our comprehensive maintenance services.
services.description:
Regular maintenance is essential for prolonging the life of your garage door and preventing costly repairs. Sandia Garage Door Repair offers comprehensive garage door maintenance services to keep your door operating smoothly and safely. Our maintenance service includes lubricating moving parts, tightening loose hardware, inspecting cables and rollers, and testing safety features. 

Albuquerque's dry climate can cause garage door components to dry out and crack, leading to premature wear and tear. Our maintenance service helps protect your garage door from the elements and ensures optimal performance. We recommend scheduling a garage door maintenance service at least once a year.
process: Step 1: Thoroughly inspect all garage door components.
Step 2: Lubricate moving parts to reduce friction.
Step 3: Tighten loose hardware and adjust as needed.
Step 4: Test safety features and sensors.

faq.question: How often should I lubricate my garage door?
faq.answer: We recommend lubricating your garage door at least twice a year, or more often if you live in a dusty or windy area.

faq.question: What type of lubricant should I use on my garage door?
faq.answer: Use a silicone-based lubricant specifically designed for garage doors. Avoid using oil-based lubricants, as they can attract dust and debris.

faq.question: Can I perform garage door maintenance myself?
faq.answer: While some maintenance tasks, such as lubricating moving parts, can be done yourself, it's best to leave more complex tasks, such as spring adjustments, to a professional.

services.name: Emergency Garage Door Repair
services.shortDescription: 24/7 emergency garage door repair services in Albuquerque and surrounding areas.
services.description:
A broken garage door can compromise your home's security and convenience. Sandia Garage Door Repair offers 24/7 emergency garage door repair services to address urgent issues that require immediate attention. Whether your garage door is stuck open, won't close, or has been damaged in a storm, our team is available around the clock to provide fast and reliable assistance. 

We understand that Albuquerque's unpredictable weather can sometimes lead to garage door emergencies. Our technicians arrive promptly, equipped with the tools and parts needed to resolve most issues on the spot. Don't hesitate to call us anytime, day or night, for emergency garage door repair services.
process: Step 1: Call our 24/7 emergency hotline.
Step 2: We'll dispatch a technician to your location immediately.
Step 3: The technician will diagnose the problem and provide a solution.
Step 4: We'll complete the repair quickly and efficiently.

faq.question: What constitutes a garage door emergency?
faq.answer: A garage door emergency includes situations such as a door that is stuck open, won't close, has been damaged in a storm, or poses a security risk.

faq.question: How quickly can you respond to an emergency repair request?
faq.answer: We strive to respond to emergency repair requests within 1-2 hours, depending on your location and the availability of our technicians.

faq.question: What areas do you serve for emergency repairs?
faq.answer: We provide emergency garage door repair services throughout Albuquerque and the surrounding areas.

serviceAreas.content:
Sandia Garage Door Repair is proud to serve the Albuquerque metro area, providing expert garage door installation, repair, and maintenance services to homeowners and businesses alike. From the historic Old Town to the vibrant University area and the growing West Side, we understand the unique needs of Albuquerque residents when it comes to their garage doors. We offer a wide selection of garage doors to match the diverse architectural styles found throughout the city, ensuring a perfect fit for your home. 

Our experienced technicians are familiar with the common garage door issues faced in Albuquerque, from dealing with the effects of the desert climate to addressing wear and tear from frequent use. We are committed to providing prompt, reliable service and using only high-quality parts to ensure the longevity and performance of your garage door. Whether you need a simple repair or a complete garage door replacement, Sandia Garage Door Repair is here to help.

reviews.name: Maria G.
reviews.text: My garage door spring broke on a Saturday morning, and I was worried about leaving my garage open all weekend. Sandia Garage Door Repair came out within an hour and replaced the spring quickly and professionally. Great service!

reviews.name: David S.
reviews.text: My garage door opener stopped working, and I couldn't get my car out of the garage. They diagnosed the problem quickly and fixed it for a reasonable price. The technician was friendly and knowledgeable.

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: Sandia Garage Door Repair installed a new garage door for me, and it looks fantastic! The installation was smooth and efficient, and the team was very helpful in choosing the right door for my home. I highly recommend them.

reviews.name: Robert K.
reviews.text: My garage door was making a terrible grinding noise, and I was afraid it was going to break down completely. Sandia Garage Door Repair came out and fixed the problem quickly and efficiently. I'm so glad I called them!

reviews.name: Susan M.
reviews.text: I recently had Sandia Garage Door Repair perform a maintenance check on my garage door, and I'm very pleased with the service. They lubricated all the moving parts and made sure everything was working properly. My garage door is now running much smoother and quieter.

reviews.name: Michael R.
reviews.text: My garage door got stuck halfway open late at night, and I couldn't get it to close. I called Sandia Garage Door Repair, and they were here within 30 minutes. They fixed the problem quickly and professionally, and I felt much safer knowing my garage was secure.
